name: Policy calibration suite
description: Safe paraphrase checks that prove strict buyer policies do not overblock legitimate wording.

cases.name: Support refund paraphrase emits
references: Refunds under 75 GBP may be handled by support staff.
Escalated billing disputes are reviewed by a human support lead.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: Refunds under 75 GBP can be handled by support staff. Escalated billing disputes get human support lead review.

cases.name: Support status paraphrase emits
references: Customers receive a status update within 2 business days.
Support staff may offer account troubleshooting steps.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: Customers can receive a status update within 2 business days. Support staff can offer account troubleshooting steps.

cases.name: Regulated approval paraphrase emits
references: Claims over 5000 GBP require enhanced review.
Payments are released after manager approval.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: Claims over 5000 GBP still require enhanced review. Payments are released only after manager approval.

cases.name: Regulated review-window paraphrase emits
references: The customer is eligible for manual review within 3 business days.
Policy withdrawals over 10000 GBP require enhanced review.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The customer can receive manual review within 3 business days. Policy withdrawals over 10000 GBP still require enhanced review.

cases.name: Research preliminary wording emits
references: The study observed a 12 percent reduction in handling errors across 40 test runs.
The authors describe the result as preliminary.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The study observed handling errors fall by 12 percent across 40 test runs. The authors call the result preliminary.

cases.name: Research benchmark scope emits
references: The benchmark reports latency measured on internal test traffic.
The benchmark excludes production customer traffic.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The benchmark measures latency on internal test traffic and excludes production customer traffic.

cases.name: Code review version paraphrase emits
references: The patch updates dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1.
Authentication behavior is unchanged.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The patch moves dependency api-client from version 1.4.0 to version 1.4.1. Authentication behavior stays unchanged.

cases.name: Code review logging paraphrase emits
references: The pull request modifies logging around failed checkout attempts.
The pull request does not change payment authorization.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The pull request changes failed-checkout logging only. The pull request leaves payment authorization unchanged.

cases.name: Agent calendar paraphrase emits
references: The calendar agent reads calendar events.
The calendar agent requires user approval before drafting replies.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The calendar agent reads calendar events. The calendar agent drafts replies only after user approval.

cases.name: Agent CRM read-only paraphrase emits
references: The support agent uses read only CRM access.
The support agent reads support tickets.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The support agent reads support tickets. The support agent keeps CRM access read only.
